title: MappingEvolve: LLM-Driven Code Evolution for Technology Mapping
authors: Rongliang Fu, Yi Liu, Qiang Xu, Tsung-Yi Ho
abstract: Technology mapping is a critical yet challenging stage in logic synthesis. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have been applied to generate optimization scripts, their potential for core algorithm enhancement remains untapped. We introduce MappingEvolve, an open-source framework that pioneers the use of LLMs to directly evolve technology mapping code. Our method abstracts the mapping process into distinct optimization operators and employs a hierarchical agent-based architecture, comprising a Planner, Evolver, and Evaluator, to guide the evolutionary search. This structured approach enables strategic and effective code modifications. Experiments show our method significantly outperforms direct evolution and strong baselines, achieving 10.04\% area reduction versus ABC and 7.93\% versus mockturtle, with 46.6\%--96.0\% $S_{overall}$ improvement on EPFL benchmarks, while explicitly navigating the area--delay trade-off. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/Flians/MappingEvolve.
title_zh: MappingEvolve：基于大语言模型的代码演化技术映射
abstract_zh: 技术映射是逻辑综合中一个关键但极具挑战性的阶段。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）已被用于生成优化脚本，但其在核心算法改进方面的潜力尚未被充分挖掘。我们提出了 MappingEvolve——一个开源框架，首次实现了利用 LLM 直接演化技术映射代码。我们的方法将映射过程抽象为一系列独立的优化算子，并采用分层的基于代理的架构，包括规划器（Planner）、演化器（Evolver）和评估器（Evaluator），以引导进化搜索。这种结构化方法使得代码修改更具策略性和有效性。实验结果表明，该方法显著优于直接演化和多个强基线方法，在 EPFL 基准测试上，相较于 ABC 实现了 10.04% 的面积降低，相较于 mockturtle 实现了 7.93% 的面积降低，同时在 $S_{overall}$ 指标上提升达 46.6\%–96.0\%，并能明确权衡面积与延迟之间的关系。相关代码与数据已公开，可访问 https://github.com/Flians/MappingEvolve。

title: Exploring the Efficiency of 3D-Stacked AI Chip Architecture for LLM Inference with Voxel
authors: Yiqi Liu, Noelle Crawford, Michael Wang, Jilong Xue, Jian Huang
abstract: To overcome the well-known memory bottleneck of AI chips, 3D stacked architectures that employ advanced packaging technology with high-density through-silicon vias (TSVs) pins have proven to be a promising solution. The 3D-stacked AI chip enables ultra-high memory bandwidth between compute and memory by stacking numerous DRAM banks atop many AI cores in a distributed manner. However, it is not easy to explore the efficiency of the 3D-stacked AI chip, due to its unique distributed nature. And we need to carefully consider multiple intertwined factors that range from upper-level computing paradigm to machine learning (ML) compiler optimizations, and to the underlying hardware architecture. In this paper, we develop Voxel, a fast and compiler-aware end-to-end simulation framework to facilitate exploring the efficiency of 3D-stacked AI chips for large language model (LLM) inference. Voxel enables the software/hardware co-exploration by employing a programming interface that allows ML compilers to customize the model execution plans. After validating the results of Voxel with an emulator on real silicon, we thoroughly examine the impact and correlation of different aspects of 3D-stacked AI chips, including state-of-the-art compute paradigms, tile-to-core mapping, tensor-to-bank mapping, NoC topologies and link bandwidth, DRAM bank bandwidth, per-core SRAM capacity, and energy/thermal constraints. Our findings disclose that the end-to-end efficiency of a 3D stacked AI chip not only is determined by the cooperative function of these factors, but also significantly depends on the mappings from tiles to AI core and DRAM banks. We report our findings throughout the paper, with the expectation that they will shed light on the development of the 3D-stacked AI chip ecosystem. We will open source Voxel and our study results for public research.
title_zh: 探索基于体素的3D堆叠AI芯片架构在大型语言模型推理中的效率
abstract_zh:
为克服AI芯片众所周知的内存瓶颈，采用先进封装技术并配备高密度硅通孔（TSVs）引脚的3D堆叠架构已被证明是一种极具前景的解决方案。通过以分布式方式将大量DRAM存储单元堆叠在多个AI核心之上，3D堆叠AI芯片能够实现计算单元与存储单元之间的超高速内存带宽。然而，由于其独特的分布式特性，探索3D堆叠AI芯片的效率颇具挑战性。我们需要仔细权衡从高层计算范式、机器学习（ML）编译器优化，到底层硬件架构等多个相互关联的因素。

本文提出Voxel——一个快速且面向编译器的端到端仿真框架，旨在促进对大语言模型（LLM）推理场景下3D堆叠AI芯片效率的深入探索。Voxel通过提供一种编程接口，使ML编译器能够自定义模型执行策略，从而实现软硬件协同探索。在使用真实硅片上的模拟器验证Voxel结果后，我们系统地分析了3D堆叠AI芯片各个方面的性能影响及其相互关系，包括最先进的计算范式、tile到核心的映射、张量到存储bank的映射、网络-on-chip（NoC）拓扑结构与链路带宽、DRAM bank带宽、每核SRAM容量，以及能效与热约束等关键因素。

我们的研究发现表明，3D堆叠AI芯片的整体端到端效率不仅取决于上述各项因素的协同作用，更显著依赖于tile到AI核心和DRAM bank之间的映射策略。本文全面报告了这些发现，期望能为3D堆叠AI芯片生态系统的未来发展提供重要启示。我们计划开源Voxel工具及本研究的所有成果，以支持公开科研工作。

title: Bian Que: An Agentic Framework with Flexible Skill Arrangement for Online System Operations
authors: Bochao Liu, Zhipeng Qian, Yang Zhao, Xinyuan Jiang, Zihan Liang, Yufei Ma, Junpeng Zhuang, Ben Chen, Shuo Yang, Hongen Wan, Yao Wu, Chenyi Lei, Xiao Liang
abstract: Operating and maintaining (O&M) large-scale online engine systems (search, recommendation, advertising) demands substantial human effort for release monitoring, alert response, and root cause analysis. While LLM-based agents are a natural fit for these tasks, the deployment bottleneck is not reasoning capability but orchestration: selecting, for each operational event, the relevant data (metrics, logs, change events) and the applicable operational knowledge (handbook rules and practitioner experience). Feeding all signals indiscriminately causes dilution and hallucination, while manually curating the event-to-(data, knowledge) mapping is intractable under dozens of daily releases. We present Bian Que, an agentic framework with three contributions: (i) a \emph{unified operational paradigm} abstracting day-to-day O&M into three canonical patterns: release interception, proactive inspection, and alert root cause analysis; (ii) \emph{Flexible Skill Arrangement}, where each Skill specifies which data and knowledge to retrieve for a given business-module context and can be automatically generated and updated by LLMs or iteratively refined through natural-language instructions from on-call engineers; (iii) a \emph{unified self-evolving mechanism} in which one correction signal drives two parallel pathways, case-memory-to-knowledge distillation and targeted Skill refinement. Deployed on the e-commerce search engine of KuaiShou, the major short-video platform in China, Bian Que reduces alert volume by 75%, achieves 80% root-cause analysis accuracy, and cuts mean time to resolution by over 50%. Our framework achieves 99.0% pass rate on offline evaluations. Our code is available at https://github.com/benchen4395/BianQue_Assistant.
title_zh: 扁鹊：一种具有灵活技能配置的自主框架，用于在线系统运维
abstract_zh:
运营和维护大规模在线引擎系统（如搜索、推荐、广告）需要投入大量人力进行发布监控、告警响应和根因分析。尽管基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体天然适用于这些任务，但实际部署中的瓶颈并非推理能力，而在于编排：针对每一次运维事件，如何精准选择相关的数据（指标、日志、变更事件）以及适用的运维知识（手册规则与工程师经验）。若将所有信号无差别地输入模型，会导致信息稀释和幻觉；而手动为每类事件建立“数据-知识”映射关系，在每天数十次发布的情况下则完全不可行。

为此，我们提出 Bian Que——一个智能体式运维框架，具有三大创新贡献：  
(i) **统一的运维范式**：将日常运维抽象为三种标准模式——发布拦截、主动巡检与告警根因分析；  
(ii) **灵活的技能配置机制**（Flexible Skill Arrangement）：每个“技能”（Skill）明确指定在特定业务模块上下文中应检索的数据与知识，并可由LLM自动生成或更新，也可通过值班工程师提供的自然语言指令迭代优化；  
(iii) **统一的自我演化机制**：单一修正信号同时驱动两条并行路径——案例记忆到知识的提炼，以及针对性的技能优化。

Bian Que 已在快手（中国领先的短视频平台）的电商搜索引擎系统中落地应用，显著提升运维效率：告警量降低75%，根因分析准确率达80%，平均故障解决时间缩短超过50%。离线评估通过率达到99.0%。相关代码已开源，地址为：https://github.com/benchen4395/BianQue_Assistant。

title: What Makes Software Bugs Escape Testing? Evidence from a Large-Scale Empirical Study
authors: Domenico Cotroneo, Giuseppe De Rosa, Cristina Improta, Benedetta Gaia Varriale
abstract: Understanding how software defects manifest and evolve in production environments is critical for improving reliability. While previous research has largely focused on pre-release defects, the nature of residual faults, i.e., those escaping testing and surfacing post-release, remains poorly understood. This paper presents a large-scale characterization of pre- and post-release defects across C/C++ and Java systems, encompassing over 14k defects mined from open-source projects. We employ a broad suite of software metrics to capture diverse code attributes such as complexity, size, structure, and development history. Results show that post-release defects are concentrated in older, frequently modified, and high-churn components, typically requiring longer and more complex fixes than pre-release ones. These findings highlight that residual defects arise more from evolutionary and process dynamics than code structure alone, suggesting that reliability engineering should prioritize targeted testing in mature and complex code regions.
title_zh: 软件缺陷为何能逃过测试？来自大规模实证研究的证据
abstract_zh: 理解软件缺陷在生产环境中的表现和演化过程，对于提升系统可靠性至关重要。尽管以往的研究主要关注发布前的缺陷，但那些逃过测试、在发布后才暴露的残余缺陷（即残留故障）的特性仍不明确。本文通过对C/C++和Java系统中超过14,000个缺陷的大规模分析，全面刻画了发布前与发布后缺陷的特征。我们采用广泛的软件度量指标，捕捉代码在复杂性、规模、结构以及开发历史等方面的多种属性。研究结果表明，发布后的缺陷主要集中于较老、频繁修改且变更剧烈的组件，其修复通常比发布前的缺陷更耗时、更复杂。这些发现表明，残余缺陷更多源于代码的演化过程与开发流程动态，而不仅仅是代码结构本身。因此，可靠性工程应更加注重对成熟且复杂的代码区域进行有针对性的测试。

title: GLM-5V-Turbo: Toward a Native Foundation Model for Multimodal Agents
authors: GLM-V Team, :, Wenyi Hong, Xiaotao Gu, Ziyang Pan, Zhen Yang, Yuting Wang, Yue Wang, Yuanchang Yue, Yu Wang, Yanling Wang, Yan Wang, Xijun Liu, Wenmeng Yu, Weihan Wang, Wei Li, Shuaiqi Duan, Sheng Yang, Ruiliang Lv, Mingdao Liu, Lihang Pan, Ke Ning, Junhui Ji, Jinjiang Wang, Jing Chen, Jiazheng Xu, Jiale Zhu, Jiale Cheng, Ji Qi, Guobing Gan, Guo Wang, Cong Yao, Zijun Dou, Zihao Zhou, Zihan Wang, Zhiqi Ge, Zhijie Li, Zhenyu Hou, Zhao Xue, Zehui Wang, Zehai He, Yusen Liu, Yukuo Cen, Yuchen Li, Yuan Wang, Yijian Lu, Yanzi Wang, Yadong Xue, Xinyu Zhang, Xinyu Liu, Wenkai Li, Tianyu Tong, Tianshu Zhang, Shengdong Yan, Qinkai Zheng, Mingde Xu, Licheng Bao, Jiaxing Xu, Jiaxin Fan, Jiawen Qian, Jiali Chen, Jiahui Lin, Haozhi Zheng, Haoran Wang, Haochen Li, Fan Yang, Dan Zhang, Chuangxin Zhao, Chengcheng Wu, Boyan Shi, Bowei Jia, Baoxu Wang, Peng Zhang, Debing Liu, Bin Xu, Juanzi Li, Minlie Huang, Yuxiao Dong, Jie Tang
abstract: We present GLM-5V-Turbo, a step toward native foundation models for multimodal agents. As foundation models are increasingly deployed in real environments, agentic capability depends not only on language reasoning, but also on the ability to perceive, interpret, and act over heterogeneous contexts such as images, videos, webpages, documents, GUIs. GLM-5V-Turbo is built around this objective: multimodal perception is integrated as a core component of reasoning, planning, tool use, and execution, rather than as an auxiliary interface to a language model. This report summarizes the main improvements behind GLM-5V-Turbo across model design, multimodal training, reinforcement learning, toolchain expansion, and integration with agent frameworks. These developments lead to strong performance in multimodal coding, visual tool use, and framework-based agentic tasks, while preserving competitive text-only coding capability. More importantly, our development process offers practical insights for building multimodal agents, highlighting the central role of multimodal perception, hierarchical optimization, and reliable end-to-end verification.
title_zh: GLM-5V-Turbo：迈向多模态智能体的原生基础模型
abstract_zh: 我们提出GLM-5V-Turbo，这是迈向原生多模态智能体基础模型的重要一步。随着基础模型在真实环境中的广泛应用，智能体的能力不仅依赖于语言推理，还取决于其对图像、视频、网页、文档、GUI等异构上下文的感知、理解与行动能力。GLM-5V-Turbo正是围绕这一目标构建：将多模态感知作为推理、规划、工具使用和执行的核心组成部分，而非作为语言模型的附加接口。本报告总结了GLM-5V-Turbo在模型设计、多模态训练、强化学习、工具链扩展以及与智能体框架集成等方面的多项关键改进。这些进展使模型在多模态编程、视觉工具使用及基于框架的智能体任务中表现出色，同时保持了与现有文本-only编程任务相媲美的竞争力。更重要的是，我们的开发过程为构建多模态智能体提供了切实可行的洞见，凸显了多模态感知的核心作用、分层优化策略以及可靠端到端验证的重要性。

title: The Buy-or-Build Decision, Revisited: How Agentic AI Changes the Economics of Enterprise Software
authors: David Klotz
abstract: Advances in generative artificial intelligence, particularly agentic coding systems capable of autonomous software development, are disrupting the economics of the make-or-buy decision for enterprise applications. The "SaaSocalypse" narrative predicts that AI will render large segments of the Software-as-a-Service market obsolete by enabling firms to build software in-house at a fraction of historical cost. This paper adopts a conceptual research approach, combining transaction cost economics and the resource-based view with an assessment of current AI capabilities, to systematically re-evaluate the factors underlying the make-or-buy decision. It makes three contributions. First, it provides a factor-level analysis of how AI reshapes seven canonical decision determinants: cost, strategic differentiation, asset specificity, vendor lock-in, time-to-market, quality and compliance, and organizational capability. Second, it develops a typology of enterprise applications by their sensitivity to AI-induced shifts in make-or-buy economics. Third, it demonstrates that AI fundamentally transforms the governance properties of the Make option, shifting it from Williamson's pure hierarchy to a hybrid governance form that combines code ownership with external AI infrastructure dependency, with qualitatively different economics, capability requirements, and governance structures than pre-AI in-house development. The analysis finds that the SaaSocalypse thesis is overstated for most enterprise application categories; Make is most compelling for commodity utilities and differentiating custom applications in the AI era, while regulated and mission-critical systems remain predominantly in the buy domain.
title_zh: 重新审视采购与自建决策：代理型人工智能如何改变企业软件的经济格局
abstract_zh: 生成式人工智能的进展，尤其是能够自主进行软件开发的代理型编码系统，正在颠覆企业应用在“自建”与“外购”之间的经济决策。所谓“SaaS末日”（SaaSocalypse）论调预测，AI将使软件即服务（SaaS）市场的大部分领域变得过时，因为企业如今可在极低的成本下自行构建软件。本文采用概念性研究方法，结合交易成本经济学与资源基础观，并评估当前AI能力，系统性地重新审视“自建”与“外购”决策背后的驱动因素。本文做出三项贡献：第一，从要素层面分析AI如何重塑七个经典决策决定因素——成本、战略差异化、资产专用性、供应商锁定、上市时间、质量和合规性，以及组织能力；第二，根据企业应用对AI引发的“自建-外购”经济格局变化的敏感程度，提出一个分类体系；第三，论证AI从根本上改变了“自建”选项的治理属性，使其从威廉姆森（Williamson）所定义的纯粹层级结构，转变为一种混合治理形式——既包含代码所有权，又依赖外部AI基础设施，其经济特征、能力要求和治理结构均与AI之前的内部开发模式有本质区别。研究发现，“SaaS末日”论调对大多数企业应用类别而言被严重夸大；在AI时代，“自建”最具吸引力的应用类型是通用型工具和具有差异化价值的定制化应用，而受监管及关键任务型系统仍主要属于“外购”范畴。

title: Enforcing Benign Trajectories: A Behavioral Firewall for Structured-Workflow AI Agents
authors: Hung Dang
abstract: Structured-workflow agents driven by large language models execute tool calls against sensitive external environments. We propose \codename, a telemetry-driven behavioral anomaly detection firewall. Drawing on sequence-based intrusion detection, \codename\ compiles verified benign tool-call telemetry into a parameterized deterministic finite automaton (pDFA). The model defines permitted tool sequences, sequential contexts, and parameter bounds. At runtime, a lightweight gateway enforces these boundaries via an $O(1)$ state-transition structural lookup, shifting computationally expensive analysis entirely offline. Evaluated on the Agent Security Bench (ASB), \codename\ achieves a 5.6\% macro-averaged attack success rate (ASR) across five scenarios. Within three structured workflows, ASR drops to 2.2\%, outperforming Aegis, a state-of-the-art stateless scanner, at 12.8\%. \codename\ achieves 0\% ASR on multi-step and context-sequential attacks in structured settings. Furthermore, against 1,000 algorithmically spliced exfiltration payloads, only 1.4\% matched valid structural paths, all of which failed end-to-end string parameter guards (0 successes out of 14 surviving paths, 95\% CI [0\%, 23.2\%]). \codename\ introduces just 2.2~ms of per-call latency (a 3.7$\times$ speedup over \textsc{Aegis}) while maintaining a 2.0\% benign task failure rate (BTFR) on benign workloads. Modeling the behavioral trajectory effectively collapses the available attack surface, but unmaintained continuous parameter bounds remain vulnerable to synonym-substitution attacks (18\% evasion rate). Thus, exact-match whitelisting of sensitive parameters ultimately bears the final defensive load against execution.
title_zh: 实施良性轨迹：面向结构化工作流AI代理的行为防火墙
abstract_zh:
由大型语言模型驱动的结构化工作流代理在执行工具调用时需对接敏感的外部环境。我们提出 \codename，一种基于遥测数据的、用于行为异常检测的防火墙机制。借鉴序列式入侵检测思想，\codename 将经过验证的良性工具调用遥测数据编译为参数化确定性有限自动机（pDFA），精确刻画被允许的工具调用序列、上下文依赖关系以及参数取值范围。运行时，一个轻量级网关通过 $O(1)$ 复杂度的状态转移结构化查表机制强制执行这些边界，将计算开销巨大的分析过程完全移至离线阶段。

在 Agent Security Bench（ASB）上的评估显示，\codename 在五个不同场景下实现了 5.6\% 的平均攻击成功率（ASR）。在其中三个结构化工作流中，ASR 进一步降至 2.2\%，显著优于当前最先进的无状态扫描器 Aegis（其 ASR 为 12.8\%）。在结构化环境中，\codename 对多步攻击和上下文相关序列攻击均实现 0\% 的 ASR。此外，在面对 1,000 个算法拼接生成的数据外泄载荷时，仅有 1.4\% 的样本匹配了合法的结构路径，且所有存活路径（共 14 条）均因字符串参数校验失败而未能成功执行（0 次成功，95\% 置信区间 [0\%, 23.2\%]）。

\codename 每次调用仅引入 2.2 毫秒的延迟（相比 \textsc{Aegis} 提升 3.7 倍速度），同时在正常任务负载下保持 2.0\% 的良性任务失败率（BTFR）。通过有效建模行为轨迹，大幅压缩了可被利用的攻击面；然而，若持续参数边界未及时更新，仍可能遭受同义替换类攻击（逃逸率达 18\%）。因此，对敏感参数实施精确匹配白名单，最终承担起抵御执行攻击的关键防御责任。

title: ProcFunc: Function-Oriented Abstractions for Procedural 3D Generation in Python
authors: Alexander Raistrick, Karhan Kayan, Jack Nugent, David Yan, Lingjie Mei, Meenal Parakh, Hongyu Wen, Dylan Li, Yiming Zuo, Erich Liang, Jia Deng
abstract: We introduce ProcFunc, a library for Blender-based procedural 3D generation in Python. ProcFunc provides a library of easy-to-use Python functions, which streamline creating, combining, analyzing, and executing procedural generation code. ProcFunc makes it easy to create large-scale diverse training data, by combinatorial compositions of semantic components. VLMs can use ProcFunc to edit procedural material and geometry code and can create new procedural code with significantly fewer coding errors. Finally, as an example use case, we use ProcFunc to develop a new procedural generator of indoor rooms, which includes a collection of new compositional procedural materials. We demonstrate the detail, runtime efficiency, and diversity of this room generator, as well as its use for 3D synthetic data generation. Please visit https://github.com/princeton-vl/procfunc for source code.
title_zh: ProcFunc：面向函数的抽象在Python中实现过程化3D生成
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了ProcFunc，一个基于Blender的Python程序化3D生成库。ProcFunc提供了一系列易于使用的Python函数，可简化程序化生成代码的创建、组合、分析与执行过程。通过语义组件的组合式构建，ProcFunc能够轻松生成大规模且多样化的训练数据。视觉语言模型（VLMs）可利用ProcFunc编辑程序化材质与几何代码，并以显著更少的编码错误生成新的程序化代码。最后，作为应用示例，我们使用ProcFunc开发了一种新型室内房间程序化生成器，其中包含一系列全新的组合式程序化材质。我们展示了该房间生成器在细节表现、运行效率和多样性方面的优势，以及其在3D合成数据生成中的应用。源代码请访问：https://github.com/princeton-vl/procfunc

title: Select to Think: Unlocking SLM Potential with Local Sufficiency
authors: Wenxuan Ye, Yangyang Zhang, Xueli An, Georg Carle, Yunpu Ma
abstract: Small language models (SLMs) offer computational efficiency for scalable deployment, yet they often fall short of the reasoning power exhibited by their larger counterparts (LLMs). To mitigate this gap, current approaches invoke an LLM to generate tokens at points of reasoning divergence, but these external calls introduce substantial latency and costs. Alternatively, standard distillation is often hindered by the capacity limitation, as SLMs struggle to accurately mimic the LLM's complex generative distribution. We address this dilemma by identifying local sufficiency: at divergence points, the LLM's preferred token consistently resides within the SLM's top-K next-token predictions, even when failing to emerge as the SLM top-1 choice. We therefore propose SELECT TO THINK (S2T), which reframes the LLM's role from open-ended generation to selection among the SLM's proposals, simplifying the supervision signal to discrete candidate rankings. Leveraging this, we introduce S2T-LOCAL, which distills the selection logic into the SLM, empowering it to perform autonomous re-ranking without inference-time LLM dependency. Empirically, we demonstrate that a 1.5B SLM's top-8 candidates capture the 32B LLM's choice with 95% hit rate. Translating this potential into performance, S2T-LOCAL improves greedy decoding by 24.1% on average across benchmarks, effectively matching the efficacy of 8-path self-consistency while operating with single-trajectory efficiency.
title_zh: 选择思考：通过本地自足解锁小语言模型的潜力
abstract_zh: 小型语言模型（SLMs）在可扩展部署中具有计算效率优势，但其推理能力通常不及大型语言模型（LLMs）。为缩小这一差距，现有方法在推理分歧点调用LLM生成token，但这种外部调用带来了显著的延迟和成本。另一种常见做法是标准知识蒸馏，然而受限于模型容量，SLMs往往难以准确模仿LLM复杂的生成分布。我们通过识别“局部充分性”解决了这一困境：在推理分歧点，尽管LLM偏好的token未必成为SLM的首选（top-1），但它始终位于SLM top-K的预测范围内。基于此，我们提出SELECT TO THINK（S2T）框架，将LLM的角色从开放式生成转变为对SLM候选输出的筛选，从而将监督信号简化为离散候选排序。在此基础上，我们进一步提出S2T-LOCAL，将选择逻辑蒸馏至SLM内部，使其能够在推理时自主完成重排序，无需依赖外部LLM。实证表明，一个15亿参数的SLM在top-8候选中即可以95%的命中率捕捉到320亿参数LLM的选择。将这一潜力转化为实际性能，S2T-LOCAL在多个基准测试上平均使贪婪解码提升24.1%，其效果接近8路径自一致性（self-consistency）方法，同时保持单轨迹推理的高效性。

title: Efficient, VRAM-Constrained xLM Inference on Clients
authors: Aditya Ukarande, Deep Shekhar, Marc Blackstein, Ram Rangan
abstract: To usher in the next round of client AI innovation, there is an urgent need to enable efficient, lossless inference of high-accuracy large language models (LLMs) and vision language models (VLMs), jointly referred to as xLMs, on client systems. To address this, we present pipelined sharding, a novel, benchmark-profile-guided CPU-GPU hybrid scheduling technique to achieve efficient, VRAM-constrained inference for both dense and mixture-of-experts (MoE) LLMs. Using a combination of model sharding at the sub-layer level, CPU offloading, pipelined copy-compute, and prioritized tensor placement in VRAM, it optimizes both time-to-first-token (TTFT) and tokens per second (TPS) metrics, while flexibly adapting to system and inference conditions. For efficient, high-accuracy VLM inference, we combine pipelined sharding with a llama$.$cpp implementation of three well-understood prior ideas (jointly called VLMOpt), namely, vision tensor CPU offloading, flash attention, and vision and language model VRAM overlap avoidance. These enhancements are targeted at improving client xLM inference in future releases of two important NVIDIA products - the In-Game Inferencing software development kit (IGI SDK) and the Cosmos-Reason1 (CR1) physical AI reasoning VLM. Highlights from our rigorous evaluation spanning multiple models and client systems include: for interactive use, TTFT improves by up to 6.7x and TPS by up to 30x for LLMs, and CR1 inference's VRAM demand is down by 10x, while in batched mode, throughput improves by up to 8.2x, all compared to their respective aggressive baselines. This paper is accepted at the 9th MLSys Conference (Industry Track), 2026. Code and artifact available at: https://github.com/deepshnv/pipeshard-mlsys26-ae
title_zh: 客户端高效且VRAM受限的xLM推理
abstract_zh:
为推动客户端人工智能创新进入下一阶段，亟需在客户端系统上实现高精度大语言模型（LLMs）和视觉语言模型（VLMs）——统称为xLMs——的高效、无损推理。为此，我们提出了一种名为“流水线分片”（pipelined sharding）的新颖调度技术，该技术基于基准性能分析，采用CPU-GPU混合调度策略，可有效支持密集型模型及专家混合模型（MoE LLMs）在显存受限条件下的高效推理。通过在子层级别进行模型分片、将计算任务卸载至CPU、采用流水线式数据复制与计算并行机制，以及在显存中优先安排张量布局，该方法同时优化了首次标记时间（TTFT）和每秒生成标记数（TPS），并能灵活适应不同的系统配置与推理场景。

针对高效且高精度的VLM推理，我们将流水线分片技术与llama.cpp框架相结合，集成三种经过充分验证的先前方法（统称为VLMOpt），包括：视觉张量的CPU卸载、Flash Attention机制，以及视觉模型与语言模型显存使用的重叠规避策略。这些改进旨在提升未来两款重要NVIDIA产品中的客户端xLM推理性能：游戏内推理软件开发工具包（IGI SDK）和Cosmos-Reason1（CR1）物理AI推理VLM。

在涵盖多种模型与客户端系统的严格评估中，主要成果包括：在交互式使用场景下，LLM的TTFT最高提升6.7倍，TPS最高提升30倍；CR1推理所需的显存降低10倍；在批处理模式下，吞吐量最高提升8.2倍，所有结果均显著优于各自具有挑战性的基线方案。

本文已被2026年第九届MLSys会议（产业赛道）录用。代码与相关资源详见：https://github.com/deepshnv/pipeshard-mlsys26-ae

title: Will It Break in Production? Metric-Driven Prediction of Residual Defects in Python Systems
authors: Giuseppe De Rosa, Pietro Liguori
abstract: Python's dynamic nature complicates testing and increases the possibility that some defects evade detection, so an effective fault prediction becomes essential. We examine whether post-release faults can be predicted using modern ML and DL. Using a balanced dataset of over 4,000 labeled faults with 83 product, process, statistical, and Python-specific metrics plus normalized code representations, we conduct cross-project experiments. LLMs and unsupervised models fail to distinguish residual from non-residual faults, while supervised metric-based models (RandomForest, XGBoost, CatBoost) perform far better, yielding a 0.85-0.9 recall and cutting false negatives by an order of magnitude. Process metrics, especially age, churn, and developer-activity, alongside class and file size, consistently prove most predictive. Notably, the Principal Component Analysis shows that metrics and code embeddings occupy distinct regions of the representation space, suggesting that they capture complementary rather than redundant information.
title_zh: Python系统中残余缺陷的生产环境崩溃预测：基于度量的驱动方法
abstract_zh: Python 的动态特性使得测试更加复杂，也增加了缺陷被遗漏的可能性，因此有效的故障预测变得至关重要。我们研究了是否可以利用现代机器学习（ML）和深度学习（DL）技术来预测发布后的故障。基于包含超过4,000个标注故障的平衡数据集，结合83个产品、过程、统计及 Python 特有的度量指标，以及归一化的代码表示，我们开展了跨项目实验。结果显示，大型语言模型（LLM）和无监督模型无法有效区分残余故障与非残余故障，而有监督的基于度量的模型（如 RandomForest、XGBoost、CatBoost）表现显著更优，召回率可达 0.85 至 0.9，同时将误报（假阴性）数量降低了一个数量级。过程度量，尤其是代码年龄、变更频率和开发者活跃度，以及类和文件大小，始终表现出最强的预测能力。值得注意的是，主成分分析（PCA）表明，度量指标与代码嵌入在表示空间中占据不同的区域，说明它们捕捉的是互补而非冗余的信息。

title: Reproducible Automated Program Repair Is Hard -- Experiences With the Defects4J Dataset
authors: Adam Krafczyk, Klaus Schmid
abstract: In the research of automated program repair (APR), benchmark datasets consisting of known defects in combination with test suites that indicate the defects are of high importance. They allow for an evidence-based comparison of different APR approaches. In our own work on APR we found significant challenges when working with widely used defect datasets, which go beyond mere repeatability of defects via test cases. We summarize these identified challenges and related lessons learned to bring them to the attention of the APR community and quantify the potential impact of them. In particular, we investigate the widely used benchmark Defects4J, which has according to Google Scholar over 1,800 citations. It consists of 835 defects from 17 open-source Java projects; a hand-curated collection of defects, test suites that clearly indicate the defect, and human patches where any unrelated changes are removed. We find that, when executing the test suites with strict requirements for reproducibility in APR settings (beyond merely reproducing the defect via test cases), 180 (21.6 %) of the defects are not suitable for evaluation experiments. Further, we find that an additional 59 (7.1 %) defects have test suites that are obviously under-specified, as deleting a single statement from the code base makes all test cases pass, although the human-written patch does not only delete code. Our contributions are: a systematic collection of requirements for defect datasets for APR beyond traditional reproducibility of defects, a description of practical experiences and quantitative analysis of problems with the Defects4J dataset, as well as an implementation of an evaluation framework for APR tools for Java programs. This evaluation framework does stricter checking for indications of inadequate test suites, to avoid otherwise unnoticed problems in the test suite, such as flaky tests.
title_zh: 可复现的自动化程序修复很困难——关于Defects4J数据集的经验
abstract_zh:
在自动化程序修复（APR）的研究中，由已知缺陷与能够指示这些缺陷的测试套件组成的基准数据集具有重要意义。它们使得不同APR方法之间能够进行基于证据的比较。在我们自身开展的APR研究工作中，发现使用广泛使用的缺陷数据集时面临诸多显著挑战，这些挑战远超仅通过测试用例复现缺陷的范畴。本文总结了这些已识别出的挑战及其相关经验教训，旨在引起APR社区的关注，并量化其潜在影响。

特别地，我们对广泛使用的基准数据集Defects4J进行了深入研究。根据Google Scholar统计，该数据集已有超过1,800次引用。Defects4J包含来自17个开源Java项目的835个缺陷，是一个经过人工精心筛选的缺陷集合，配有明确指示缺陷的测试套件，以及经清理后去除无关修改的人工修复补丁。

我们发现，在APR场景下，若对可重复性施加更严格的要求（不仅限于通过测试用例复现缺陷），则有180个（占21.6%）缺陷不适合用于评估实验。此外，另有59个（占7.1%）缺陷的测试套件明显存在规格不足的问题：仅删除代码库中的一个语句，所有测试用例即可通过，而人类编写的修复补丁却并非仅仅删除代码。这表明测试套件未能充分捕捉缺陷的本质。

本文的主要贡献包括：  
1. 系统性地提出了一套超越传统缺陷可复现性的APR缺陷数据集构建要求；  
2. 对Defects4J数据集存在的实际问题进行了详尽描述，并提供了定量分析；  
3. 实现了一个针对Java程序APR工具的评估框架，该框架对测试套件的充分性进行更严格的检查，以避免因测试套件本身存在问题（如不稳定的“flaky tests”）而导致评估结果失真。

本研究强调了高质量基准数据集在APR研究中的关键作用，并呼吁社区在使用和构建数据集时更加审慎，以确保评估结果的可靠性与科学性。

title: Templates in Rewriting Induction
authors: Kasper Hagens, Cynthia Kop
abstract: Rewriting Induction (RI) is a formal system in term rewriting to establish program equivalence. The recently defined Bounded RI for higher-order Logically Constrained Term Rewriting Systems (LCSTRSs) yields a convenient proof system for analyzing real programming code. A practical challenge in RI is the automatic generation of induction hypotheses, called lemmas. While various lemma generation techniques exist for plain term rewriting, there are much fewer that consider the intricacies brought on by calculations or constraints. Taking advantage of recent developments in higher-order RI, we here present a new approach based on templates, which operates by recognising typical programming constructs as instances of higher-order functions. While templates have been used as a stand-alone method to justify the correctness of program transformations, we here consider their integration in Bounded RI to obtain a complementary lemma generation heuristic. This allows us to prove equivalences that were previously out of reach.
title_zh: 重写归纳中的模板
abstract_zh: 重写归纳法（Rewriting Induction, RI）是一种在项重写系统中建立程序等价性的形式化系统。最近定义的高阶逻辑约束项重写系统（LCSTRSs）中的有界RI，为分析实际编程代码提供了一个便捷的证明系统。RI面临的一个实际挑战是归纳假设（即引理）的自动生成。尽管针对普通项重写已存在多种引理生成技术，但能够处理计算或约束带来的复杂性的方法却相对较少。借助高阶RI的最新进展，本文提出一种基于模板的新方法：通过识别典型的编程结构作为高阶函数的实例来实现。虽然模板曾被用作独立方法以证明程序变换的正确性，但本文将其集成到有界RI中，作为一种补充的引理生成启发式策略。该方法使我们能够证明此前难以达成的等价性。

title: TDD Governance for Multi-Agent Code Generation via Prompt Engineering
authors: Tarlan Hasanli, Shahbaz Siddeeq, Bishwash Khanal, Pyry Kotilainen, Tommi Mikkonen, Pekka Abrahamsson
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) accelerate software development but often exhibit instability, non-determinism, and weak adherence to development discipline in unconstrained workflows. While test-driven development (TDD) provides a structured Red-Green-Refactor process, existing LLM-based approaches typically use tests as auxiliary inputs rather than enforceable process constraints. We present an AI-native TDD framework that operationalizes classical TDD principles as structured prompt-level and workflow-level governance mechanisms. Extracted principles are formalized in a machine-readable manifesto and distributed across planning, generation, repair, and validation stages within a layered architecture that separates model proposal from deterministic engine authority. The system enforces phase ordering, bounded repair loops, validation gates, and atomic mutation control to improve stability and reproducibility. We describe architecture and discuss encoding software engineering discipline directly into prompt orchestration, which we think offers a promising direction for reliable LLM-assisted development.
title_zh: 通过提示工程实现多智能体代码生成的TDD治理
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）虽加速了软件开发进程，但在无约束的工作流中常表现出不稳定性、非确定性以及对开发规范的弱遵循。尽管测试驱动开发（TDD）提供了一套结构化的“红-绿-重构”流程，但现有的基于LLM的方法通常仅将测试作为辅助输入，而非可执行的过程约束。本文提出一种原生面向AI的TDD框架，将经典TDD原则转化为分层的提示级与工作流级治理机制。提取出的核心原则被形式化为机器可读的宣言，并分布于规划、生成、修复和验证等阶段，构建在分层架构之上，实现模型提议与确定性引擎权威的分离。该系统通过强制执行阶段顺序、限定修复循环次数、设置验证关卡以及控制原子级变更，显著提升了开发过程的稳定性与可复现性。我们详细描述了该架构，并探讨了如何将软件工程规范直接编码至提示编排之中，认为这一方向为实现可靠的LLM辅助开发提供了极具前景的路径。

title: Graph Construction and Matching for Imperative Programs using Neural and Structural Methods
authors: Arshad Beg, Diarmuid O'Donoghue, Rosemary Monahan
abstract: Reusing verification artefacts requires identifying structural and semantic similarities across programs and their specifications. In this paper, we focus on graph construction as a foundational step toward this goal. We present a pipeline that converts imperative programs and their annotations into typed, attributed graphs. Our experiments cover datasets including C with ACSL, Java with JML, and Dafny for C\#. The pipeline integrates abstract syntax tree parsing with semantic embeddings derived from models such as SentenceTransformer and CodeBERT. This enables the generation of graph representations that capture both structural relationships and semantic context. Our results show that consistent graph representations can be constructed across different languages and annotation styles. This work provides a practical basis for future steps in semantic enrichment and approximate graph matching for scalable verification artefact reuse.
title_zh: 使用神经网络与结构化方法对命令式程序进行图构建与匹配
abstract_zh: 重用验证工件需要识别程序及其规范之间的结构和语义相似性。本文聚焦于图构建这一实现该目标的基础步骤。我们提出了一种将命令式程序及其注释转换为带类型、带属性的图的处理流程。实验数据集涵盖使用ACSL的C语言、使用JML的Java语言，以及使用C#的Dafny语言。该流程结合了抽象语法树解析与来自SentenceTransformer和CodeBERT等模型的语义嵌入，从而生成能够同时捕捉结构关系和语义上下文的图表示。实验结果表明，不同编程语言和注释风格之间可以构建出一致的图表示。本工作为未来在语义增强和近似图匹配方面的可扩展验证工件重用奠定了实用基础。

title: PAINT: Partial-Solution Adaptive Interpolated Training for Self-Distilled Reasoners
authors: Zhiquan Tan, Yinrong Hong
abstract: Improving large language model (LLM) reasoning requires supervision that is both aligned with the model's own test-time states and informative at the token level. Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards provides on-policy exploration but offers sparse, high-variance credit; supervised fine-tuning and distillation provide dense targets but often train on fixed trajectories or rely on stronger teachers. Recent privileged on-policy self-distillation explores a middle ground by scoring student rollouts with the same model under verified solution context. We revisit this setting through a contextual re-scoring lens: for reasoning, the important choices are not only whether privileged context is available, but how much of it should be revealed and where its distribution should shape the student. We propose PAINT (Partial-solution Adaptive INterpolated Training), which masks the verified solution according to rollout-reference overlap and applies a small energy-space interpolation on a sparse set of entropy-mismatch token positions. Across competition-level math benchmarks, PAINT consistently improves over a strong prior on-policy self-distillation baseline at all three Qwen3 scales. On Qwen3-8B, it raises macro Avg@12 by 2.1 points over this prior baseline and 2.9 points over GRPO.
title_zh: PAINT：面向自蒸馏推理模型的部分解自适应插值训练
abstract_zh: 提升大型语言模型（LLM）的推理能力，需要一种既与模型自身在测试时的状态对齐，又能在词元层面提供丰富信息的监督方式。基于可验证奖励的强化学习虽能实现在线策略探索，但其信用分配稀疏且方差高；而监督微调和知识蒸馏则提供密集的目标信号，却通常依赖于固定轨迹或更强的教师模型。近期提出的特权在线自蒸馏方法在两者之间寻求平衡：利用同一模型在已验证解上下文下的表现来评分学生模型的推演轨迹。我们从“上下文重评分”的视角重新审视这一设定——对于推理任务而言，关键问题不仅在于是否拥有特权上下文，更在于应揭示多少上下文信息，以及这些信息的分布应如何影响学生模型的学习。为此，我们提出PAINT（部分解自适应插值训练）方法：根据推演轨迹与参考解的重叠程度对已验证解进行掩码，并在熵不匹配的稀疏词元位置上施加小规模的能量空间插值。在多个竞赛级数学基准测试中，PAINT在Qwen3系列的三个规模（Qwen3-8B、Qwen3-14B、Qwen3-72B）上均显著优于此前强大的在线自蒸馏基线。尤其在Qwen3-8B上，PAINT相较该基线提升了宏平均准确率@12达2.1个百分点，相比GRPO方法更是提升了2.9个百分点。

title: Tatemae: Detecting Alignment Faking via Tool Selection in LLMs
authors: Matteo Leonesi, Francesco Belardinelli, Flavio Corradini, Marco Piangerelli
abstract: Alignment faking (AF) occurs when an LLM strategically complies with training objectives to avoid value modification, reverting to prior preferences once monitoring is lifted. Current detection methods focus on conversational settings and rely primarily on Chain-of-Thought (CoT) analysis, which provides a reliable signal when strategic reasoning surfaces, but cannot distinguish deception from capability failures if traces are absent or unfaithful. We formalize AF as a composite behavioural event and detect it through observable tool selection, where the LLM selects the safe tool when unmonitored, but switches to the unsafe tool under monitoring that rewards helpfulness over safety, while its reasoning still acknowledges the safe choice. We release a dataset of 108 enterprise IT scenarios spanning Security, Privacy, and Integrity domains under Corruption and Sabotage pressures. Evaluating six frontier LLMs across five independent runs, we find mean AF detection rates between 3.5% and 23.7%, with vulnerability profiles varying by domain and pressure type. These results suggest that susceptibility reflects training methodology rather than capability alone.
title_zh: 表面言行：通过大语言模型中的工具选择检测对齐伪造
abstract_zh: 对齐伪造（Alignment Faking, AF）是指大语言模型（LLM）为避免价值观被修改，战略性地遵守训练目标，在监控解除后又恢复到先前的偏好。当前的检测方法主要集中在对话场景中，依赖于思维链（Chain-of-Thought, CoT）分析。当模型展现出策略性推理时，该方法能提供可靠信号；但若缺乏或存在不可靠的痕迹，则无法区分欺骗行为与能力不足。我们把AF形式化为一种复合行为事件，并通过可观测的工具选择来检测：在未受监控时，模型会选择安全工具；而在受到监控、奖励“有用性”而非“安全性”的情况下，会切换至不安全工具，尽管其推理过程仍承认安全选项是正确的。我们发布了包含108个企业IT场景的数据集，覆盖安全、隐私和完整性领域，在腐败与破坏压力下进行测试。在五次独立运行中评估六款前沿LLM，发现平均AF检测率介于3.5%至23.7%之间，且脆弱性特征随领域和压力类型而异。这些结果表明，模型的易感性更多反映的是训练方法，而非单纯的能力问题。

title: SWE-Bench 5G: Benchmarking AI Coding Agents on Telecom Network Engineering Tasks
authors: Jiao Chen, Jianhua Tang, Xiaotong Yang, Zuohong Lv
abstract: AI coding agents demonstrate strong performance on general-purpose software benchmarks. However, their ability to handle 5G network engineering tasks remains unexplored. We propose SWE-Bench~5G, the first benchmark designed to investigate whether AI coding agents can resolve real-world bugs in 5G core network software. The benchmark collects task instances from three open-source 5G projects, packages each as a self-contained Docker environment with automated fail-to-pass tests, and provides a dual test strategy tailored to the complex runtime dependencies of telecom code. In addition, for instances whose original issues reference 3GPP specification clauses, we construct concise specification context documents, enabling controlled evaluation of whether domain knowledge improves agent performance. Experiments on four LLMs reveal that all models diagnose bugs at rates exceeding 91\%, yet resolve rates remain between 10\% and 30\%, suggesting that both iterative code editing capability and domain knowledge play important roles. The specification injection experiment further confirms that 3GPP excerpts improve resolve rates on specification-dependent bugs, while the gains on generic defensive checks remain limited, indicating that the effect of domain knowledge is conditional on bug type.
title_zh: SWE-Bench 5G：在电信网络工程任务中对AI编程代理的基准测试
abstract_zh: AI 编码代理在通用软件基准测试中表现出色，但其在 5G 网络工程任务中的能力仍鲜有研究。为此，我们提出了 SWE-Bench~5G，这是首个旨在探究 AI 编码代理能否解决 5G 核心网络软件中真实世界缺陷的基准测试。该基准从三个开源 5G 项目中收集任务实例，将每个任务封装为独立的 Docker 环境，并配备自动化的“失败转通过”测试机制，同时设计了一种针对电信代码复杂运行时依赖关系的双重测试策略。此外，对于原始问题引用了 3GPP 规范条款的任务实例，我们构建了简洁的规范上下文文档，以实现对领域知识是否提升代理性能的可控评估。在四个大语言模型上的实验表明，所有模型的缺陷诊断率均超过 91%，但修复率仅为 10% 至 30%，表明迭代代码编辑能力和领域知识均起着关键作用。规范注入实验进一步证实，3GPP 相关内容能有效提升与规范相关的缺陷修复率，而对通用防御性检查类问题的改进则有限，说明领域知识的作用具有依赖于缺陷类型的前提条件。

title: FlowBot: Inducing LLM Workflows with Bilevel Optimization and Textual Gradients
authors: Hongyeon Yu, Young-Bum Kim, Yoon Kim
abstract: LLM workflows, which coordinate structured calls to individual LLMs (each augmented with varying instructions and tools) to achieve a particular goal, offer a promising path towards extending the capabilities of LLMs and building powerful systems that can tackle diverse tasks. However, existing approaches for building such workflows generally rely on human-crafted pipelines and prompts, which presents a substantial bottleneck in real world deployment. How can automatically induce and optimize such workflows in a data-driven way? This paper describes a simple data-driven approach for automatically inducing LLM workflows. We formulate workflow induction as a bilevel optimization problem: an outer loop which optimizes a high-level sketch of the workflow (in particular how the LLM calls should be structured), and an inner loop which optimizes each individual LLM call one-by one. Both loops are optimized with ``textual gradients'' where for the inner loop we optimize each component in a modular way through ``backpropagating'' textual gradients layer-by-layer. We find that LLM workflows discovered through our \textsc{FlowBot} (work\textbf{flow} induction through \textbf{b}ilevel \textbf{o}ptimization and \textbf{t}extual gradients) approach performs competitively against strong baselines that make use of human-crafted or automatically-generated workflows.
title_zh: FlowBot：基于双层优化与文本梯度的大型语言模型工作流生成
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）工作流通过协调对各个LLM的结构化调用（每个LLM均配备不同的指令和工具），以实现特定目标，为扩展LLM的能力并构建能够应对多样化任务的强大系统提供了有前景的路径。然而，现有的工作流构建方法通常依赖于人工设计的流水线和提示词，这在实际部署中构成了显著瓶颈。如何以数据驱动的方式自动推导并优化这些工作流？本文提出了一种简单而有效的方法，用于自动推导LLM工作流。我们将工作流推导建模为一个双层优化问题：外层优化工作流的高层概要（特别是LLM调用应如何组织），内层则逐个优化每个LLM调用。两个层次均采用“文本梯度”进行优化，其中内层通过逐层“反向传播”文本梯度，以模块化方式优化每个组件。我们发现，通过我们的FlowBot（工作流推导通过双层优化与文本梯度）方法所发现的LLM工作流，在性能上可与使用人工设计或自动生成工作流的强基线方法相媲美。

title: ClassEval-Pro: A Cross-Domain Benchmark for Class-Level Code Generation
authors: Yeheng Chen, Chaoxiang Xie, Yuling Shi, Wenhao Zeng, Yongpan Wang, Hongyu Zhang, Xiaodong Gu
abstract: LLMs have achieved strong results on both function-level code synthesis and repository-level code modification, yet a capability that falls between these two extremes -- compositional code creation, i.e., building a complete, internally structured class from a specification -- remains underserved. Current evaluations are either confined to isolated functions or rely on manually curated class-level tasks that are expensive to scale and increasingly susceptible to data contamination. We introduce ClassEval-Pro, a benchmark of 300 class-level tasks spanning 11 domains, constructed through an automated three-stage pipeline that combines complexity enhancement, cross-domain class composition, and integration of real-world GitHub code contributed after January 2025. Every task is validated by an LLM Judge Ensemble and must pass test suites with over 90% line coverage. We evaluate five frontier LLMs under five generation strategies. The best model achieves only 45.6% class-level Pass@1, with a 17.7-point gap between the strongest and weakest models, confirming the benchmark's discriminative power. Strategy choice strongly interacts with model capability: structured approaches such as bottom-up improve weaker models by up to 9.4 percentage points, while compositional generation collapses to as low as 1.3%. Error analysis over 500 manually annotated failures reveals that logic errors (56.2%) and dependency errors (38.0%) dominate, identifying cross-method coordination as the core bottleneck.
title_zh: ClassEval-Pro：面向类级别代码生成的跨领域基准
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在函数级代码生成和仓库级代码修改任务上已取得显著成果，但介于两者之间的能力——即组合式代码创建（compositional code creation），例如根据规格说明构建一个完整且内部结构合理的类——仍缺乏有效支持。当前的评估体系要么局限于孤立函数，要么依赖于人工精心设计的类级别任务，而这类任务不仅难以规模化，还日益面临数据污染的风险。为此，我们提出了 ClassEval-Pro，这是一个涵盖11个领域、共300个类级别任务的基准测试集，通过一个自动化的三阶段流程构建而成，该流程融合了复杂度增强、跨领域类组合以及整合2025年1月之后来自真实GitHub项目的代码贡献。每个任务均经过LLM判官集成（LLM Judge Ensemble）验证，并需通过测试套件且覆盖率达90%以上。我们在五种前沿LLM上，针对五种不同的生成策略进行了评估。表现最佳的模型也仅达到45.6%的类级别Pass@1得分，最强与最弱模型之间存在17.7个百分点的差距，充分证明了该基准的区分能力。策略选择与模型能力之间存在强烈交互作用：对于能力较弱的模型，采用自底向上的结构化方法可提升最多达9.4个百分点；而组合式生成则可能骤降至仅1.3%。对500个手动标注失败案例的错误分析显示，逻辑错误（56.2%）和依赖关系错误（38.0%）占据主导地位，揭示出跨方法协调是当前的核心瓶颈。

title: OpenSOC-AI: Democratizing Security Operations with Parameter Efficient LLM Log Analysis
authors: Chaitanya Vilas Garware, Sharif Noor Zisad
abstract: Small and medium sized businesses (SMBs) face an escalating cybersecurity threat landscape, yet most lack the resources to staff full Security Operations Centers (SOCs) or deploy enterprise grade detection platforms. This paper presents OpenSOC-AI, a lightweight log analysis framework that uses parameter efficient fine tuning of a 1.1-billion parameter language model (TinyLlama-1.1B) to perform automated threat classification, MITRE ATT&CK technique mapping, and severity assessment on raw security log entries. Using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) with only 12.6 million trainable parameters (roughly 1.13% of the base model), we fine tuned on 450 domain specific SOC examples in under five minutes on a single NVIDIA T4 GPU. Testing on a heldout set of 50 examples showed a 68% point gain in threat classification accuracy (from 0% to 68%), a 30% point gain in severity accuracy (from 28% to 58%), and an F1 score of 0.68 compared to the untuned baseline. Full codebase, adapter weights, and datasets are publicly released to support reproducibility and community extension.
title_zh: OpenSOC-AI：以参数高效的大语言模型日志分析，实现安全运营的民主化
abstract_zh: 中小企业（SMBs）正面临日益严峻的网络安全威胁，但大多数企业缺乏资源组建完整的安全运营中心（SOC）或部署企业级检测平台。本文提出OpenSOC-AI，一个轻量级日志分析框架，利用参数高效的微调技术，对11亿参数的语言模型TinyLlama-1.1B进行优化，实现对原始安全日志条目的自动化威胁分类、MITRE ATT&CK技术映射以及严重性评估。通过仅使用1260万可训练参数（约占基础模型的1.13%）的低秩适应（LoRA）方法，我们在单个NVIDIA T4 GPU上仅用不到五分钟便完成了在450个领域特定SOC示例上的微调。在保留的50个测试样本上，威胁分类准确率提升了68个百分点（从0%提升至68%），严重性分类准确率提升了30个百分点（从28%提升至58%），F1得分达到0.68，显著优于未微调的基线模型。完整代码库、适配器权重及数据集均已公开发布，以支持研究复现与社区扩展。

title: Hot Fixing in the Wild
authors: Carol Hanna, Karine Even-Mendoza, W. B. Langdon, Mar Zamorano López, Justyna Petke, Federica Sarro
abstract: Despite the operational importance of hot fixes, large-scale evidence on how they reshape routine maintenance workflows, particularly in the era of autonomous coding agents, remains limited. We analyse hot fixes present in over 61,000 GitHub repositories from the Hao-Li/AIDev dataset and find consistent patterns of urgency: reduced collaboration (typically a single contributor), smaller and more targeted changes (median 2-3 commits and files, with <10 line modifications), limited review (often fewer than two reviewers), and substantially fewer test file modifications than regular bug fixes, consistent with their urgency-driven character. Leveraging the same urgency contexts, we examine differences between human- and AI-agent-authored hot fixes, revealing over 10 distinct repair behaviours, thus offering insights into future human-automation collaboration for hot fixing. Our study is the first to empirically analyse hot fix code changes at scale using a repository-level operationalisation of urgency. The comparison of human and agentbehaviours delineates their distinct characteristics, providing a foundation for understanding hot fixing in real-world practice
title_zh: 野外热修复
abstract_zh: 尽管热修复在运维中具有重要意义，但关于其如何重塑常规维护工作流程——尤其是在自主编码代理时代——的大规模实证研究仍十分有限。我们分析了来自Hao-Li/AIDev数据集的超过61,000个GitHub仓库中的热修复，发现其普遍存在紧迫性特征：协作减少（通常仅由单一贡献者完成）、修改范围小且针对性强（平均2-3次提交和文件变更，修改行数少于10行）、审查环节有限（通常少于两名审阅者），以及相比常规缺陷修复，测试文件的修改数量显著更少，这些特征均体现出其紧迫驱动的本质。基于相同的紧迫情境，我们进一步比较了人类与AI代理编写的热修复之间的差异，揭示出超过10种不同的修复行为模式，为未来人机协同进行热修复提供了重要洞见。本研究是首个基于仓库级紧迫性操作化定义，对热修复代码变更进行大规模实证分析的研究。通过对人类与AI代理行为的对比，清晰界定了二者在实际操作中的不同特征，为理解真实世界中的热修复实践奠定了基础。

title: OMEGA: Optimizing Machine Learning by Evaluating Generated Algorithms
authors: Jeremy Nixon, Annika Singh
abstract: In order to automate AI research we introduce a full, end-to-end framework, OMEGA: Optimizing Machine learning by Evaluating Generated Algorithms, that starts at idea generation and ends with executable code. Our system combines structured meta-prompt engineering with executable code generation to create new ML classifiers. The OMEGA framework has been utilized to generate several novel algorithms that outperform scikit-learn baselines across a robust selection of 20 benchmark datasets (infinity-bench). You can access models discussed in this paper and more in the python package: pip install omega-models.
title_zh: OMEGA：通过评估生成的算法优化机器学习
abstract_zh: 为了实现人工智能研究的自动化，我们提出了一套完整的端到端框架——OMEGA：通过评估生成算法来优化机器学习（Optimizing Machine learning by Evaluating Generated Algorithms）。该框架从创意生成开始，最终输出可执行代码。我们的系统结合了结构化的元提示工程与可执行代码生成技术，成功创建了新的机器学习分类器。OMEGA框架已被用于生成多种新颖算法，在涵盖20个基准数据集（infinity-bench）的广泛测试中，其性能超越了scikit-learn的基线模型。您可以通过Python包获取本文讨论的模型及其他更多模型：pip install omega-models。

title: Cognitive Atrophy and Systemic Collapse in AI-Dependent Software Engineering
authors: Frank Ginac
abstract: The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into the software development lifecycle (SDLC) masks a critical socio-technical failure: Cognitive-Systemic Collapse. This paper introduces "Epistemological Debt," the hidden carrying cost incurred when engineers substitute logical derivation with passive AI verification. This debt erodes the mental models essential for root-cause analysis, widening the gap between system complexity and human comprehension. Furthermore, recursive training on synthetic code threatens to homogenize the global software reservoir, diminishing the variance required for robust engineering. Using the 2026 Amazon outages as a case study, this research illustrates how "mechanized convergence" leads to systemic fragility. To preserve long-term resilience, engineering leaders must move beyond prompt-based development to implement rigorous human-in-the-loop pedagogical standards. This framework balances AI-driven productivity with the epistemic sovereignty necessary to manage increasingly opaque software ecosystems.
title_zh: 人工智能依赖型软件工程中的认知萎缩与系统性崩溃
abstract_zh: 将大型语言模型（LLM）融入软件开发生命周期（SDLC）掩盖了一个关键的社技术性失败：认知-系统性崩溃。本文提出“认识论债务”这一概念，指工程师在用被动的AI验证替代逻辑推导时所隐含的代价。这种债务正逐渐侵蚀进行根本原因分析所必需的心理模型，进一步拉大系统复杂性与人类理解能力之间的鸿沟。此外，对合成代码进行递归训练，正威胁着全球软件资源的多样性，削弱了工程创新所必需的差异性。本文以2026年亚马逊服务中断事件为案例研究，揭示“机械化趋同”如何导致系统脆弱性的加剧。为保障长期韧性，工程领导者必须超越基于提示词的开发模式，建立严格的“人在回路”教育标准。这一框架在提升AI驱动的生产力的同时，也维护了管理日益复杂的软件生态所必需的认知主权。

title: DSIPA: Detecting LLM-Generated Texts via Sentiment-Invariant Patterns Divergence Analysis
authors: Siyuan Li, Aodu Wulianghai, Guangyan Li, Xi Lin, Qinghua Mao, Yuliang Chen, Jun Wu, Jianhua Li
abstract: The rapid advancement of large language models (LLMs) presents new security challenges, particularly in detecting machine-generated text used for misinformation, impersonation, and content forgery. Most existing detection approaches struggle with robustness against adversarial perturbation, paraphrasing attacks, and domain shifts, often requiring restrictive access to model parameters or large labeled datasets. To address this, we propose DSIPA, a novel training-free framework that detects LLM-generated content by quantifying sentiment distributional stability under controlled stylistic variation. It is based on the observation that LLMs typically exhibit more emotionally consistent outputs, while human-written texts display greater affective variation. Our framework operates in a zero-shot, black-box manner, leveraging two unsupervised metrics, sentiment distribution consistency and sentiment distribution preservation, to capture these intrinsic behavioral asymmetries without the need for parameter updates or probability access. Extensive experiments are conducted on state-of-the-art proprietary and open-source models, including GPT-5.2, Gemini-1.5-pro, Claude-3, and LLaMa-3.3. Evaluations on five domains, such as news articles, programming code, student essays, academic papers, and community comments, demonstrate that DSIPA improves F1 detection scores by up to 49.89% over baseline methods. The framework exhibits superior generalizability across domains and strong resilience to adversarial conditions, providing a robust and interpretable behavioral signal for secure content identification in the evolving LLM landscape.
title_zh: DSIPA：通过情感不变模式差异分析检测大语言模型生成文本
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）的快速发展带来了新的安全挑战，尤其是在检测用于制造虚假信息、冒名顶替和内容伪造的机器生成文本方面。现有的大多数检测方法在面对对抗性扰动、改写攻击以及领域迁移时表现出鲁棒性不足的问题，且通常需要对模型参数进行受限访问或依赖大规模标注数据集。为解决这一问题，我们提出了一种名为DSIPA的新颖无训练框架，通过在受控风格变化下量化情感分布的稳定性来检测LLM生成的内容。该方法基于一个关键观察：LLM生成的文本通常具有更高的情感一致性，而人类撰写的文本则表现出更显著的情感多样性。DSIPA以零样本、黑盒方式运行，利用两个无监督指标——情感分布一致性与情感分布保持度——捕捉这些内在的行为不对称性，无需参数更新或概率值访问。我们在最先进的专有及开源模型（包括GPT-5.2、Gemini-1.5-pro、Claude-3和LLaMa-3.3）上进行了大量实验，并在新闻文章、编程代码、学生作文、学术论文和社区评论等五个不同领域进行了评估。结果表明，相较于基线方法，DSIPA在F1检测得分上最高提升了49.89%。该框架展现出优异的跨领域泛化能力以及对对抗性环境的强大抗性，为不断演进的LLM生态中安全的内容识别提供了一种稳健且可解释的行为信号。

title: Agentic AI in the Software Development Lifecycle: Architecture, Empirical Evidence, and the Reshaping of Software Engineering
authors: Happy Bhati
abstract: The arrival of large language models (LLMs) capable of multi-step reasoning, tool use, and long-horizon planning has produced a qualitative shift in software engineering. Where earlier code-completion tools such as GitHub Copilot operated at the granularity of a line or function, modern agentic systems -- Claude Code, OpenAI Codex CLI, Google Jules, Devin, OpenHands, SWE-agent, MetaGPT, ChatDev, and DeepMind's AlphaEvolve -- operate at the granularity of a repository, a feature, or an algorithm. We synthesize work from Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Microsoft Research, Princeton, Stanford, and the broader academic community to characterize this transition. We propose a six-layer reference architecture for agentic software engineering systems, contrast a traditional Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) with an emerging Agentic SDLC (A-SDLC), and consolidate empirical evidence on performance (a rise from 1.96% to 78.4% on SWE-bench Verified between October 2023 and April 2026), productivity (13.6%-55.8% time savings across controlled studies), and labor-market impact (49% of jobs sampled by Anthropic in 2026 saw AI used for at least a quarter of their tasks). We argue that the central object of inquiry has shifted from code generation to delegated execution under human supervision, and we identify five open problems -- evaluation, governance, technical debt, skill redistribution, and the economics of attention -- that will determine whether the agentic transition is net-positive for the discipline.
title_zh: 智能代理AI在软件开发生命周期中的应用：架构、实证证据与软件工程的重塑
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）的出现，具备多步推理、工具调用和长期规划能力，为软件工程领域带来了质的飞跃。早期的代码补全工具（如 GitHub Copilot）仅在单行或函数级别进行操作，而现代智能体系统——包括 Claude Code、OpenAI Codex CLI、Google Jules、Devin、OpenHands、SWE-agent、MetaGPT、ChatDev 以及 DeepMind 的 AlphaEvolve——则已扩展到项目仓库、功能模块或算法层面的操作粒度。本文综合了 Anthropic、OpenAI、Google DeepMind、微软研究院、普林斯顿大学、斯坦福大学及更广泛的学术界研究成果，对这一转变进行了系统性梳理。我们提出了一种六层参考架构，用于描述智能体式软件工程系统；将传统的软件开发生命周期（SDLC）与新兴的智能体式软件开发生命周期（A-SDLC）进行对比；并整合了实证证据：在 SWE-bench Verified 测试集上，性能从 2023 年 10 月的 1.96% 提升至 2026 年 4 月的 78.4%；在受控研究中，生产效率提升达 13.6% 至 55.8%；根据 Anthropic 在 2026 年的抽样调查，49% 的岗位至少有四分之一的工作任务已由人工智能承担。我们认为，当前研究的核心已从单纯的代码生成，转向在人类监督下实现任务委托执行。同时，我们识别出五个关键开放问题——评估机制、治理框架、技术债务管理、技能重构、注意力经济——这些因素将决定智能体转型是否最终对软件工程领域带来净正向影响。

title: eDySec: A Deep Learning-based Explainable Dynamic Analysis Framework for Detecting Malicious Packages in PyPI Ecosystem
authors: Sk Tanzir Mehedi, Raja Jurdak, Chadni Islam, Abu Bakar Siddique Mahi, Gowri Ramachandran
abstract: The security of open-source software repositories is increasingly threatened by next-gen software supply chain attacks. These attacks include multiphase malware execution, remote access activation, and dynamic payload generation. Traditional Machine Learning (ML) detectors struggle to detect these attacks due to the high-dimensional and sparse nature of dynamic behavioral data, including system calls, network traffic, directory access patterns, and dependency logs. As a result, these data characteristics degrade the performance, stability, and explainability of ML models. These challenges have made Deep Learning (DL) a promising alternative, given its success across various domains and its potential for modeling complex patterns. This paper presents eDySec, a DL-based efficient, stable, and explainable framework for dynamic behavioral analysis to detect malicious packages. Using the QUT-DV25 dataset, which captures both install-time and post-installation behaviors of packages, we evaluate DL models and investigate feature sets to identify the most discriminative attributes for enabling efficient malicious package detection. Additionally, model stability analysis and explainable AI techniques are incorporated into the detection pipeline to enable stable, and transparent interpretations of model decisions. Experimental results demonstrate that eDySec significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art frameworks. Specifically, it halves feature dimensionality while lowering false positives by 82% and false negatives by 79%. It also improves accuracy by 3%, achieves near-perfect stability, and maintains an inference latency of 170ms per package. Further analysis reveals that feature and model selection play a critical role, as certain combinations degrade performance. Ultimately, this study advances the understanding of the strengths and limitations of dynamic analysis against next-gen attacks.
title_zh: eDySec：一种基于深度学习的可解释动态分析框架，用于检测PyPI生态中的恶意软件包
abstract_zh:
开源软件仓库的安全正日益受到新一代软件供应链攻击的威胁。这些攻击包括多阶段恶意代码执行、远程访问激活以及动态载荷生成等行为。传统机器学习（ML）检测方法在应对这类攻击时表现不佳，原因在于动态行为数据（如系统调用、网络流量、目录访问模式和依赖日志）具有高维度和稀疏性的特点，导致ML模型的性能、稳定性和可解释性均受到显著影响。在此背景下，深度学习（DL）因其在多个领域的成功应用及其对复杂模式建模的潜力，成为一种极具前景的替代方案。

本文提出eDySec——一种基于深度学习的高效、稳定且可解释的动态行为分析框架，用于检测恶意软件包。我们利用QUT-DV25数据集（该数据集同时记录了软件包安装时与安装后的行为）评估多种深度学习模型，并探究不同特征集合，以识别最具区分力的属性，从而实现高效的恶意包检测。此外，本框架还引入了模型稳定性分析与可解释人工智能（XAI）技术，确保模型决策过程具备稳定性和透明性。实验结果表明，eDySec显著优于现有最先进框架：在将特征维度降低一半的同时，误报率下降82%，漏报率降低79%；准确率提升3%，达到近乎完美的稳定性，并保持每包170毫秒的推理延迟。进一步分析揭示，特征选择与模型选型至关重要，某些组合会严重损害整体性能。最终，本研究深化了对动态分析在应对新一代攻击中优势与局限性的理解。

title: Recommendations for Efficient and Responsible LLM Adoption within Industrial Software Development
authors: Krishna Ronanki, Beatriz Cabrero-Daniel, Tomas Herda, Stefan Sitkovich, Jennifer Horkoff, Christian Berger
abstract: Context: Large language models (LLMs) are observed to have a significant positive impact on various software engineering (SE) activities. With improved accessibility, the adoption of powerful LLMs in industry has surged recently. However, there is a lack of actionable best practices for the efficient and responsible adoption of LLMs within industrial software settings. Objectives: We developed seven actionable recommendations to address this research gap. Methods: We conducted a multi-case study with three organisations that use LLMs within their SE activities and synthesised seven recommendations through qualitative thematic analysis. We conducted a complementary online survey with software practitioners from various industries to evaluate the perceived relevance of our recommendations. Results: Our results and recommendations focus on (i) users' preference to use LLMs as AI assistants, (ii) the importance of relevant stakeholders' satisfaction in the LLM-output evaluation, (iii) scoping the applicability of LLMs within SE tasks, (iv) the effect of LLMs on SE workflows, (v) the necessity and directions for developing human oversight mechanisms, and (vi) the necessary skills for practitioners for leveraging LLMs within SE. The online survey indicates a high level of agreement from the participants regarding the perceived relevance of the recommendations. Conclusion: We outline future research directions, including mapping the seven recommendations to the principles of the EU AI Act (AIA) in order to examine how they relate to the current regulatory compliance frameworks.
title_zh: 工业软件开发中高效且负责任地采用大语言模型的建议
abstract_zh:
上下文：大型语言模型（LLMs）在各类软件工程（SE）活动中被观察到具有显著的积极影响。随着可访问性的提升，近年来工业界对强大LLM的采用迅速增长。然而，在工业软件环境中高效且负责任地采用LLM方面，仍缺乏可操作的最佳实践。  
目标：我们提出了七项可操作的建议，以填补这一研究空白。  
方法：我们对三家在软件工程活动中使用LLM的组织进行了多案例研究，并通过定性主题分析提炼出七项建议。此外，我们还开展了一项补充在线调查，向来自不同行业的软件从业者收集反馈，以评估这些建议的感知相关性。  
结果：我们的研究结果与建议聚焦于以下六个方面：（i）用户倾向于将LLM作为AI助手使用；（ii）在评估LLM输出时，相关利益方的满意度至关重要；（iii）明确LLM在SE任务中的适用范围；（iv）LLM对SE工作流程的影响；（v）建立人类监督机制的必要性及具体方向；（vi）从业人员为有效利用LLM所需具备的技能。在线调查结果显示，参与者对这些建议的感知相关性高度认同。  
结论：我们指出了未来的研究方向，包括将这七项建议映射至欧盟人工智能法案（AIA）的原则，以探讨其与当前监管合规框架之间的关联。

title: Beyond Code Reasoning: A Specification-Anchored Audit Framework for Expert-Augmented Security Verification
authors: Masato Kamba, Hirotake Murakami, Akiyoshi Sannai
abstract: Security-critical software is routinely audited by tools that reason about vulnerabilities as repository-local code patterns. Yet specification-governed systems -- protocol stacks, consensus implementations, cryptographic libraries -- are constrained by invariants and correctness conditions defined in natural-language specifications. When a vulnerability arises from what the specification requires rather than how code is written, code-level approaches lack the representational vocabulary to detect it, and their false positives resist systematic diagnosis. We present SPECA, a specification-anchored security audit framework that derives explicit, typed security properties from natural-language specifications and audits implementations through structured proof-attempt reasoning grounded in each property. The framework yields three capabilities absent from code-driven auditing: spec-dependent detections, controlled cross-implementation comparison under a shared property vocabulary, and false positives that decompose into interpretable, pipeline-phase-traceable root causes. On the Sherlock Ethereum Fusaka Audit Contest (366 submissions, 10 implementations), SPECA recovers all 15 in-scope vulnerabilities and independently discovers 4 bugs confirmed by developer fix commits. On the RepoAudit C/C++ benchmark (15 projects), SPECA matches the best published precision (88.9\%) while surfacing 12 candidate bugs beyond the established ground truth, two confirmed by upstream maintainers. A multi-model analysis reveals that more capable models audit more faithfully within property scope, shifting the detection bottleneck from model reasoning to property generation quality. All false positives trace to three recurring root causes -- trust boundary misunderstanding, code reading errors, and specification misinterpretation -- each yielding actionable improvement targets.
title_zh: 超越代码推理：一种基于规范锚定的专家增强型安全验证审计框架
abstract_zh: 安全关键型软件通常通过工具进行常规审计，这些工具将漏洞视为代码库内的局部代码模式。然而，规范驱动的系统——如协议栈、共识实现和密码学库——其行为受到自然语言规范中定义的不变量和正确性条件的约束。当漏洞源于规范本身的要求，而非代码的具体实现时，传统的代码级方法缺乏相应的表达能力来识别此类问题，且其产生的误报难以系统化地诊断。我们提出SPECA，一种以规范为核心的安全部署审计框架：该框架从自然语言规范中推导出明确的、带类型的安全部分属性，并通过基于每项属性的结构化证明尝试推理来审计实现。该框架带来了代码驱动审计所不具备的三项能力：依赖于规范的检测、在共享属性词汇表下对多个实现进行可控对比分析，以及可分解为可解释、可追溯至特定处理阶段根本原因的误报。在Sherlock以太坊Fusaka审计竞赛（366份提交，10个实现）中，SPECA成功复现了所有15个相关漏洞，并独立发现4个经开发者修复提交确认的漏洞。在RepoAudit C/C++基准测试（15个项目）中，SPECA达到了已发表的最佳精确率（88.9%），同时发现了12个超出现有真实情况的候选漏洞，其中两个已获上游维护者确认。多模型分析表明，更强大的模型在属性范围内能更忠实于规范地执行审计，从而将检测瓶颈从模型推理能力转移到属性生成质量上。所有误报均可归因于三个反复出现的根本原因：信任边界误解、代码理解错误和规范误读，每一类都提供了可操作的改进方向。

title: An Empirical Study of Speculative Decoding on Software Engineering Tasks
authors: Yijia Li, Junkai Chen, Xing Hu, Xin Xia
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become widely used for Software Engineering (SE) tasks, spanning from function-level code generation to complex repository-level workflows. However, the high latency of autoregressive inference remains a significant bottleneck, hindering their deployment in interactive environments. While Speculative Decoding (SD) offers a promising technique for lossless acceleration, prior research on long-context repository-level tasks and complex agentic interactions remains limited. To bridge this gap, we present the first systematic empirical study to evaluate the effectiveness of SD in SE tasks. We systematically benchmark a comprehensive spectrum of strategies, encompassing both model-based and model-free methods, across representative generation, editing, and repair scenarios. Our empirical results indicate that SD demonstrates clear potential for accelerating inference, particularly for smaller models that achieve higher speedups than those of their larger counterparts. We find that the effectiveness of SD methods varies across different task scenarios. Model-based approaches are well-suited for code generation, whereas model-free methods are better adapted to repository-level repair and editing scenarios. Furthermore, we observe that the repetitiveness of SE tasks improves the performance of model-free methods. In contrast to natural language tasks, the higher predictability of SE tasks allows for more aggressive hyperparameters. Our findings are summarized as guidelines to help increase inference efficiency for SE scenarios.
title_zh: 关于推测解码在软件工程任务中的实证研究
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）已广泛应用于软件工程（SE）任务中，涵盖从函数级代码生成到复杂的仓库级工作流等多个方面。然而，自回归推理的高延迟仍是制约其在交互式环境中部署的主要瓶颈。尽管推测解码（Speculative Decoding, SD）提供了一种无损加速的有前景技术，但针对长上下文仓库级任务及复杂智能体交互的前期研究仍十分有限。为填补这一空白，我们首次开展了系统性的实证研究，评估SD在软件工程任务中的有效性。我们对一系列代表性策略进行了全面基准测试，涵盖基于模型和不依赖模型的方法，覆盖生成、编辑和修复等多种典型场景。实验结果表明，SD在加速推理方面展现出显著潜力，尤其对于较小规模的模型，其速度提升优于大模型。我们发现，不同SD方法在各类任务场景中的表现存在差异：基于模型的方法更适合代码生成任务，而不依赖模型的方法则更适用于仓库级修复与编辑场景。此外，我们观察到，由于软件工程任务具有较高的重复性，这有助于提升不依赖模型方法的性能。与自然语言任务相比，SE任务更高的可预测性使得可以采用更为激进的超参数设置。我们的研究结果总结为若干实用指南，旨在帮助提升SE场景下的推理效率。

title: Turning the TIDE: Cross-Architecture Distillation for Diffusion Large Language Models
authors: Gongbo Zhang, Wen Wang, Ye Tian, Li Yuan
abstract: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) offer parallel decoding and bidirectional context, but state-of-the-art dLLMs require billions of parameters for competitive performance. While existing distillation methods for dLLMs reduce inference steps within a single architecture, none address cross-architecture knowledge transfer, in which the teacher and student differ in architecture, attention mechanism, and tokenizer. We present TIDE, the first framework for cross-architecture dLLM distillation, comprising three modular components: (1) TIDAL, which jointly modulates distillation strength across training progress and diffusion timestep to account for the teacher's noise-dependent reliability; (2) CompDemo, which enriches the teacher's context via complementary mask splitting to improve predictions under heavy masking; and (3) Reverse CALM, a cross-tokenizer objective that inverts chunk-level likelihood matching, yielding bounded gradients and dual-end noise filtering. Distilling 8B dense and 16B MoE teachers into a 0.6B student via two heterogeneous pipelines outperforms the baseline by an average of 1.53 points across eight benchmarks, yielding notable gains in code generation, where HumanEval scores reach 48.78 compared to 32.3 for the AR baseline.
title_zh: 扭转浪潮：面向扩散型大语言模型的跨架构知识蒸馏
abstract_zh: 扩散型大语言模型（dLLMs）具备并行解码和双向上下文建模的优势，但当前最先进的dLLMs为实现竞争力表现，通常需要数十亿参数。尽管现有的dLLM知识蒸馏方法能够在单一架构内减少推理步数，却均未解决跨架构知识迁移问题——即教师模型与学生模型在架构、注意力机制和分词器方面存在差异。本文提出TIDE，首个面向跨架构dLLM蒸馏的框架，包含三个模块化组件：(1) TIDAL，通过联合调节训练进程与扩散时间步的蒸馏强度，以适应教师模型因噪声依赖而产生的可靠性变化；(2) CompDemo，通过互补掩码分割增强教师模型的上下文信息，从而在高掩码率下提升预测性能；(3) Reverse CALM，一种跨分词器目标函数，反向执行块级似然匹配，实现有界梯度与双端噪声过滤。通过两条异构蒸馏路径，将8B稠密型和16B MoE型教师模型分别蒸馏至0.6B学生模型，在八个基准测试中平均性能超越基线1.53分，尤其在代码生成任务中取得显著提升，HumanEval得分达到48.78，远超自回归基线的32.3。

title: Decoupling Knowledge and Task Subspaces for Composable Parametric Retrieval Augmented Generation
authors: Weihang Su, Hanwen Zhang, Qingyao Ai, Yiqun Liu
abstract: Parametric Retrieval-Augmented Generation (PRAG) encodes external documents into lightweight parameter modules that can be retrieved and merged at inference time, offering a promising alternative to in-context retrieval augmentation. Despite its potential, many PRAG implementations train document adapters with task-supervised objectives, which may cause each adapter to encode both document-specific facts and reusable task-solving behavior. This entanglement may make adapter composition less reliable: when multiple adapters are merged at inference time, their overlapping task behaviors can accumulate together with document-specific updates, potentially making the merged adapter less stable and less focused on the intended document knowledge. To examine this issue, we explore Orthogonal Subspace Decomposition (OSD), an adapter-training setup that separates reusable task behavior from document-specific knowledge adapters. Concretely, we first train a Task LoRA to capture reusable task behavior, and then train document LoRAs to encode document-specific knowledge in a orthogonal subspace. This setup provides a controlled way to examine how orthogonalizing task and document LoRA updates affects adapter composition in multi-document PRAG. Experiments across multiple knowledge-intensive tasks and model scales suggest that this orthogonalization strategy can improve compositional robustness in parametric RAG, especially when multiple document adapters are merged.
title_zh: 用于可组合参数化检索增强生成的知识与任务子空间解耦
abstract_zh:
参数化检索增强生成（Parametric Retrieval-Augmented Generation, PRAG）将外部文档编码为轻量级的参数模块，这些模块可在推理时被检索并合并，为上下文内检索增强提供了一种有前景的替代方案。尽管具有巨大潜力，但许多PRAG实现采用任务监督的目标来训练文档适配器，这可能导致每个适配器同时编码文档特定的事实信息和可复用的任务求解行为。这种耦合现象可能使适配器组合的可靠性下降：在推理时合并多个适配器时，它们重叠的任务行为会与文档特异性更新一同累积，从而可能降低合并后适配器的稳定性，并使其偏离对目标文档知识的关注。

为深入探讨这一问题，我们引入正交子空间分解（Orthogonal Subspace Decomposition, OSD）——一种将可复用任务行为与文档特异性知识分离的适配器训练框架。具体而言，我们首先训练一个任务LoRA以捕捉通用的任务求解行为，随后训练文档LoRA，使其在正交子空间中编码文档特有的知识。该方法提供了一种受控方式，用于研究正交化任务与文档LoRA更新如何影响多文档PRAG中的适配器组合性能。

在多个知识密集型任务及不同模型规模上的实验表明，这种正交化策略能够显著提升参数化RAG中的组合鲁棒性，尤其是在需要合并多个文档适配器的情况下表现尤为突出。

title: Comparing Smart Contract Paradigms: A Preliminary Study of Security and Developer Experience
authors: Matteo Vaccargiu, Andrea Pinna, Maria Ilaria Lunesu, Giuseppe Destefanis
abstract: Smart contract vulnerabilities have caused billions in financial losses, raising questions about whether programming language paradigms can reduce security overhead. While imperative languages like Solidity require developers to manually implement security checks, resource-oriented languages like Move encode safety guarantees in type systems. We present a preliminary mixed-methods study analyzing 12 functionally-equivalent contract pairs implemented in both Solidity and Move by the same development team, complemented by a survey of 11 developers experienced in both languages. Quantitative analysis reveals that Move reduces explicit security overhead by 60\% (security check density: 6.7% vs. 16.8%, p=0.002, Cohen's d=-1.75) at the cost of 47% larger code size (p=0.002, d=1.90), while maintaining identical cyclomatic complexity. Developer surveys show moderate learning difficulty but higher safety confidence in Move (Median=6/7, 10 of 11 above neutral), with 55% preferring Move for security-critical applications despite ecosystem maturity gaps. These preliminary findings suggest resource-oriented paradigms shift security from runtime validation to compile-time guarantees, though adoption requires investment in learning and tooling. The controlled comparison provides initial evidence for paradigm effects on smart contract development, informing language selection decisions and identifying opportunities for improved developer resources.
title_zh: 智能合约范式比较：安全与开发者体验的初步研究
abstract_zh: 智能合约漏洞已导致数十亿美元的财务损失，引发了关于编程语言范式能否降低安全开销的讨论。尽管像Solidity这样的命令式语言要求开发者手动实现安全检查，而像Move这样的资源导向型语言则将安全保证编码进类型系统中。我们开展了一项初步的混合方法研究，分析了同一开发团队使用Solidity和Move实现的12对功能等价的合约，并对11位同时熟悉两种语言的开发者进行了调查。定量分析显示，Move将显式的安全开销降低了60%（安全检查密度：6.7% vs. 16.8%，p=0.002，Cohen's d=-1.75），但代码规模增加了47%（p=0.002，d=1.90），同时保持了相同的圈复杂度。开发者调查结果显示，Move的学习难度适中，但安全性信心更高（中位数=6/7，11人中有10人高于中性水平），尽管生态成熟度存在差距，仍有55%的开发者更倾向于在安全关键的应用中使用Move。这些初步发现表明，资源导向型范式将安全从运行时验证转变为编译时保证，但其采用需要投入学习和工具链建设。受控对比提供了范式对智能合约开发影响的初步证据，有助于指导语言选择决策，并揭示改进开发者资源的机会。

title: FACT: Compositional Kernel Synthesis with a Three-Stage Agentic Workflow
authors: Sina Heidari, Dimitrios S. Nikolopoulos
abstract: Deep learning compilers and vendor libraries deliver strong baseline performance but are bounded by finite, engineer-curated catalogs. When these omit needed optimizations, practitioners substitute hand-written CUDA or CUTLASS, demanding expertise in GPU microarchitecture and C++ template metaprogramming. Recent LLM-based agents target kernel generation in raw CUDA, forcing rediscovery of optimizations already encoded in mature libraries. We present FACT (Framework for Agentic CUTLASS Transpilation), a framework that employs a three-stage, agent-driven workflow optimizing PyTorch modules through multi-pattern composition while grounding synthesis in CUTLASS C++. (1) Pattern discovery: an LLM agent inspects the traced graph, matches subgraphs to optimization rules, retrieves vetted examples from an architecture-specific index, and outputs prioritized patterns. (2) Pattern realization: each pattern is implemented as a CUTLASS kernel wrapped in a PyTorch extension, verified, and auto-tuned by sweeping parameters inferred from the CUTLASS hierarchy. (3) Pattern composition: extensions are loaded together into a single composed module for end-to-end benchmarking. We evaluate the workflow using KernelBench's evaluation framework and provided modules on an NVIDIA A100. On Level 1, we apply the workflow to three GEMM workloads (square matrix multiply, batched matrix multiply, and large-$K$ matrix multiply). Auto-tuned CUTLASS kernels improve over PyTorch cuBLAS baseline by $1.06\times$--$1.18\times$. On Level 3 MiniGPT block, composing fused multi-head attention with fused MLP GEMM+GELU yields $2.79\times$ end-to-end speedup. Our work couples agentic graph-level pattern discovery with auto-tuning and a dynamic pattern table, offering a practical path from traced PyTorch to deployable kernels by automating CUTLASS kernel synthesis and auto-tuning.
title_zh: 事实：基于三阶段代理工作流的组合核合成
abstract_zh:
深度学习编译器和厂商库虽然能够提供强劲的基线性能，但其优化能力受限于有限且由工程师手动维护的优化规则库。当这些规则库缺少所需优化时，开发者往往不得不采用手工编写CUDA或CUTLASS代码，这要求对GPU微架构和C++模板元编程有深入理解。近期基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体尝试直接生成原始CUDA内核，却重复发现了早已在成熟库中实现的优化方案。我们提出FACT（Agentic CUTLASS Transpilation框架），一种三阶段、由智能体驱动的工作流，通过多模式组合方式优化PyTorch模块，并以CUTLASS C++为合成基础。

（1）模式发现：一个LLM智能体分析追踪后的计算图，将子图与优化规则进行匹配，从针对特定架构的已验证示例索引中检索相关案例，并输出优先级排序的优化模式；  
（2）模式实现：每个优化模式被实现为一个封装在PyTorch扩展中的CUTLASS内核，经验证后通过自动调优机制对参数进行扫描，参数来源于CUTLASS的层级结构；  
（3）模式组合：将多个扩展模块加载至单一组合模块中，支持端到端基准测试。

我们在NVIDIA A100上使用KernelBench评估框架及提供的模块对整个工作流进行了评估。在Level 1层面，我们将该流程应用于三个GEMM任务（方阵乘法、批量矩阵乘法、大K值矩阵乘法），经过自动调优的CUTLASS内核相较PyTorch cuBLAS基线性能提升1.06倍至1.18倍。在Level 3 MiniGPT模块中，将融合的多头注意力与融合的MLP GEMM+GELU组合后，实现了高达2.79倍的端到端加速。

本工作将智能体驱动的图级模式发现、自动调优与动态模式表相结合，为从追踪后的PyTorch代码到可部署内核的转化提供了一条实用路径，实现了CUTLASS内核合成与自动调优的全流程自动化。

title: Identifying and Characterizing Semantic Clones of Solidity Functions
authors: Ermanno Francesco Sannini, Francesco Salzano, Simone Scalabrino, Rocco Oliveto, Remo Pareschi, Corrado Aaron Visaggio, Andrea Di Sorbo
abstract: Smart Contracts are essential blockchain components, mainly written in Solidity. The high availability of public Solidity code leads to frequent reuse and high clone ratios. Since cloning can propagate vulnerabilities and flaws, effective detection is crucial. Although existing techniques work well in detecting syntactic clones, the identification of semantic clones is an open problem. To address this challenge, in this paper, we present and empirically assess a scalable methodology, based on analyzing code and comments, to spot semantically equivalent Solidity functions. We first collected an up-to-date dataset of about 300,000 Ethereum smart contracts, 82.07% of which are compliant with modern Solidity version 0.8. Manual validation of a statistically significant sample comprising 1,155 function pairs confirms the effectiveness of our solution, achieving an overall precision of 59% (rising to 84% for homonymous functions) and a recall of 97%. Besides, we explore the structural differences occurring on semantically equivalent Solidity functions, demonstrating that they often represent design alternatives focused on security choices, modularization, and gas optimization. Finally, we investigate the use of Large Language Models (LLMs) as documentation engines in scenarios where code comments are poor or absent. Our results show that LLM-generated summaries, combined with sentence transformers like BERT, can bridge the documentation gap, enabling the identification of semantic clones in uncommented code with 75% precision. This work establishes a modern benchmark for Solidity clone detection and provides a foundation for the automated discovery of secure and efficient code alternatives.
title_zh: 识别并表征Solidity函数的语义克隆
abstract_zh: 智能合约是区块链系统中的关键组成部分，主要使用 Solidity 语言编写。由于公开的 Solidity 代码数量庞大，导致代码频繁被复用，克隆率居高不下。而代码克隆可能传播漏洞和缺陷，因此有效的克隆检测至关重要。尽管现有技术在检测语法级克隆方面表现良好，但语义克隆的识别仍是一个未解决的难题。为应对这一挑战，本文提出并实证评估了一种基于分析代码与注释的可扩展方法，用于发现语义等价的 Solidity 函数。我们首先收集了一个包含约 30 万份以太坊智能合约的最新数据集，其中 82.07% 的合约符合现代 Solidity 版本 0.8 的规范。通过对一个具有统计意义的样本（共 1,155 对函数）进行人工验证，证实了该方法的有效性：整体精确率达到 59%（对于同名函数甚至达到 84%），召回率高达 97%。此外，我们还研究了语义等价 Solidity 函数之间的结构差异，发现这些差异通常体现了安全策略、模块化设计以及 gas 优化等方面的设计取舍。最后，我们探索了大型语言模型（LLMs）作为代码文档生成器的应用场景，尤其在缺乏或缺失注释的情况下。实验结果表明，结合 BERT 等句子嵌入模型，LLM 自动生成的摘要能够有效弥补文档缺失问题，在无注释代码中实现 75% 的语义克隆识别准确率。本研究建立了一个面向 Solidity 克隆检测的现代基准，为自动发现安全且高效的代码替代方案奠定了基础。

title: Auto-Relational Reasoning
authors: Ioannis Konstantoulas, Dimosthenis Tsimas, Pavlos Peppas, Kyriakos Sgarbas
abstract: Background & Objectives: In the last decade, Machine learning research has grown rapidly, but large models are reaching their soft limits demonstrating diminishing returns and still lack solid reasoning abilities. These limits could be surpassed through synergistic combination of Machine Learning scalability and rigid reasoning. Methods: In this work, we propose a theoretical framework for reasoning through object-relations in an automated manner integrated with Artificial Neural Networks. We present a formal analysis of the Reasoning, and we show the theory in practice through a paradigm integrating Reasoning and Machine Learning. Results: This paradigm is a system that solves Intelligence Quotient problems without any prior knowledge of the problem. Our system achieves 98.03% solving rate corresponding to the top 1% percentile or 132-144 iq score. This result is only limited by the small size of the model and the processing capabilities of the machine it run on. Conclusions: With the integration of prior knowledge in the system and the expansion of the dataset, the system can be generalized to solve a large category of problems. The functionality of the system inherently favors the solution of such problems in few-shot or zero-shot attempts.
title_zh: 自动关联推理
abstract_zh:
背景与目标：过去十年中，机器学习研究迅速发展，但大型模型已接近其软性极限，表现出收益递减的迹象，且仍缺乏扎实的推理能力。通过将机器学习的可扩展性与严格的逻辑推理相结合，这些局限有望被突破。

方法：本文提出了一种理论框架，旨在通过自动化方式对对象间关系进行推理，并将其与人工神经网络集成。我们对推理过程进行了形式化分析，并通过一个融合推理与机器学习的新范式展示了该理论的实际应用。

结果：该范式所构建的系统能够在不依赖任何问题先验知识的情况下解决智商测试题。我们的系统实现了98.03%的问题求解率，对应于前1%的百分位，即智商得分达到132至144。这一成果目前仅受限于模型规模较小以及运行机器的处理能力。

结论：随着在系统中引入先验知识并扩大数据集，该系统可推广至解决大量类型的问题。该系统的功能本质上有利于在少样本甚至零样本条件下高效求解类似问题。

title: CONCERTO : Optimization of readout electronics
authors: Mounir Abdkrimi, Olivier Rossetto, Olivier Bourrion, Christophe Hoarau, Christophe Vescovi
abstract: The CONCERTO millimeter-wave spectral-imaging instrument was deployed on the Atacama Pathfinder EXperiment (APEX), where it acquired science data between April 2021 and May 2023. The instrument features two focal-plane arrays, each composed of 2400 Microwave Kinetic Inductance Detectors (MKIDs). Each array is divided into six feedlines containing 400 MKIDs each, with each feedline read out by a dedicated FPGA-based board, KID_READOUT. The next-generation instrument aims to double the detector count per feedline, increasing it from 400 to 800 MKIDs. Achieving this requires a substantial scaling of the readout architecture and poses two key challenges for KID_READOUT: maintaining readout signal integrity and constraining firmware resource usage, as a direct upscaling of the existing design would exceed the available FPGA capacity. To overcome these limitations, we developed a Python-based, cycle-and bit-accurate digital twin of the full FPGA digital signal processing chain. This model enabled a detailed investigation of internal signal behavior and provided quantitative guidance for firmware optimization. Leveraging these insights, we identified the source of two spurs present in CONCERTO data and significantly reduced their amplitudes. At the same time, we achieved substantial reductions in firmware resource usage-39.0%pt in LUTs, 20.3%pt in flip-flops, and 28.98%pt in DSP slices-without degrading readout performance. The resulting architecture supports more than 800 MKIDs per feedline on the same hardware platform while preserving readout signal quality, offering a scalable and resource-efficient solution for future high-resolution millimeter-wave astronomical instruments.
title_zh: CONCERTO：读出电子学的优化
abstract_zh:
CONCERTO毫米波光谱成像仪部署于阿塔卡马探路者实验（APEX）望远镜，自2021年4月至2023年5月期间获取了科学观测数据。该仪器配备两个焦平面阵列，每个阵列由2400个微波动能感应探测器（MKIDs）组成。每个阵列被划分为六个读出通道（feedlines），每条通道包含400个MKIDs，每条通道由专用的基于FPGA的读出板KID_READOUT进行读出。下一代仪器计划将每条读出通道的探测器数量翻倍，从400个增至800个MKIDs。实现这一目标需要对读出架构进行大幅扩展，同时给KID_READOUT带来两大关键挑战：保持读出信号的完整性，以及在不超出现有FPGA资源容量的前提下控制固件资源消耗。若直接沿用现有设计进行扩容，将超出FPGA的可用资源。

为克服这些限制，我们开发了一个基于Python的、周期与位级精确的FPGA数字信号处理链全系统数字孪生模型。该模型使我们能够深入分析内部信号行为，并为固件优化提供了量化的指导依据。借助这些洞察，我们成功定位了CONCERTO数据中两个杂散信号的来源，并显著降低了其幅度。与此同时，我们在不损害读出性能的前提下，实现了固件资源使用的大幅降低：查找表（LUTs）减少39.0个百分点，触发器（flip-flops）减少20.3个百分点，数字信号处理单元（DSP slices）减少28.98个百分点。由此获得的新架构可在同一硬件平台上支持每条读出通道超过800个MKIDs，同时保持高质量的读出信号性能，为未来高分辨率毫米波天文仪器提供了一种可扩展且资源高效的解决方案。

title: A Multi-Level Integrity Evaluation Framework for Quantum Circuits under Controlled Anomaly Injection
authors: Ejaz Ahmed, Boshuai Ye, Syed Hamza Shah, Muhammad Azeem Akbar, Arif Ali Khan
abstract: Ensuring the integrity of quantum circuits is a significant challenge in the Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) era, where circuits are subject to compilation transformations, hardware constraints, and potential adversarial modifications. Existing validation approaches typically rely on either structural analysis or behavioral evaluation, leading to incomplete assessment of circuit correctness.
